name: base-ci-self-test-fixture
description: Fixture exercised by .github/workflows/self-test.yml. self-test-marker writes a sentinel file from its postinstall script, so we can assert --ignore-scripts truly skipped it. self-test-native-marker is intentionally NOT in trustedDependencies — it simulates a native dep whose postinstall is gated behind 'bun pm trust' and exercises the v2026.3 trusted-native-deps input.
